commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: reproduce LU-6271
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: reproduce LU-6271

This is a for-test-only patch to reproduce LU-6271.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100,PTLDEBUG=-1,SUBSYSTEM=-1,DEBUG_SIZE=300,TIMEOUT=10,SERVER_FAILOVER_PERIOD=600 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el6.6 ossdistro=el6.6 mdsdistro=el6.6 clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=recovery-mds-scale
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
